creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
On Monday 17 September 2007 00:23, Tijl Coosemans wrote:
> Could you build and install wine with "make WITH_DEBUG=yes install" and
> then run "winedbg wordpad" and post the output (backtrace)?

WITH_DEBUG=yes build makes wordpad run perfectly, the problem is only 
reproducable with non-debug build (I've tried several times rebuilding it, 
the result is the same as described)
-- 
Regards, Mirya
ICQ #313898202
